meta.site_description: Buy and sell original art directly from independent artists. Find paintings, drawings, sculptures and more on Konstbyte.
meta.site_description_short: Buy and sell original art directly from independent artists.

footer.brand_tagline: A community where creators grow together. Buy and sell unique works directly from artists.
footer.fee_tagline: Only 3% platform fee — secure payments with Stripe.

home.hero_description: Show off your work, inspire others and find a community driven by the joy of creation — at any level.
home.load_error: Technical error — could not load artworks. Please try again later.
home.no_artworks_sub: Check back soon — or be the first to publish a work.
home.how_it_works_title: From upload to delivery in three steps.
home.step1_text: Create your profile, add a bio and present who you are as an artist.
home.step2_text: Upload a photo, set a price and choose shipping — all in under five minutes.
home.step3_text: Stripe handles the payment. You track the order and the money goes directly to you.
home.cta_description: Build your audience, showcase your work and start selling — all in one place, with only 3% fee.

challenge.title: Weekly Art Challenge
challenge.ended_text: The challenge has ended — see the results below.
challenge.about_description: Create a painting based on this week's theme and compete to be the weekly winner!
challenge.about_description2: Each week a new theme is randomly selected — from game characters to nature motifs and abstract expressions. Your task is to create a painting within the time limit and upload it here on Konstbyte.
prizes: A spot in the Hall of Fame
The opportunity to sell your work directly through the platform
Points on the leaderboard (participation + likes + bonus points for winning)
challenge.who_text: All artists — beginners and experienced alike. What matters is creativity, not perfection.
how_steps: Create a painting based on this week's theme
Upload it here on the page
Wait for the results when the week ends
challenge.description_placeholder: Tell us about your work and your interpretation of the theme…
challenge.price_placeholder: Leave blank if the work is not for sale
challenge.submissions_count_active: {count} entries · Like counts are hidden until the challenge ends.
challenge.delete_confirm: Delete your entry? This cannot be undone.
challenge.no_challenge: No active challenge right now. See Hall of Fame below.
challenge.points_info: +10 for participating · +1 per like · +50 for winning
challenge.login_like: You must be signed in to like

ai.title: AI Tools
ai.subtitle: Powerful tools to help you value, explore and create — right inside the platform.
ai.inspiration_desc: Describe a feeling, theme or style — and let AI generate ideas, motifs and directions for your next work.
ai.value_art_desc: Upload an artwork and get an instant price estimate based on style, technique and market trends.

ai.leave_empty: Leave empty for general inspiration ideas

tips: Use a clear image in good lighting
Show the entire work without reflections or shadows
Include information about size and technique
Remember that the AI valuation is an estimate
ai.disclaimer_short: The valuation is an AI-based estimate and does not replace a professional assessment.

join.title: Become an artist on Konstbyte
join.subtitle: Create your artist page and start selling your works
join.meta_title: Join Konstbyte — Marketplace for Swedish Artists
join.meta_description: Create a free account and start selling your art, participate in weekly challenges and meet Sweden's new art community.
join.meta_og_description: Sell your art, enter competitions and find your community. Only 3% commission.
join.hero_heading: Create, share and sell your art.
join.hero_subtext: Join Sweden's new art community. Showcase your works, compete in weekly challenges and start selling — all in one place.
join.hero_footnote: Only 3% on sales — no hidden fees.
join.benefits_heading: Everything you need in one place.

benefits.title: Sell your art easily
benefits.desc: Upload a work in under five minutes. Stripe handles the payment — you get the money directly.

benefits.title: Join weekly challenges
benefits.desc: Compete to be the weekly winner, earn points and build your reputation as an artist.

benefits.title: Find your community
benefits.desc: Discuss, get inspired and follow other artists. Grow together with like-minded creators.

benefits.title: Only 3% commission
benefits.desc: No monthly fee, no hidden costs. We only take 3% on sales — that's it.

benefits.title: Safe delivery
benefits.desc: Full tracking on every order. The buyer pays shipping — you handle the packaging.

benefits.title: AI valuation
benefits.desc: Unsure about the price? Let our AI tool help you set the right price for your work.

steps.title: Create account

steps.title: Sell & get paid
steps.desc: Buyers find you, pay via Stripe, you ship the work.

about.title: About Konstbyte
about.heading: A place where art lives on
about.intro: Konstbyte is a place where creativity is given space and where art lives on in new homes. We believe art should be accessible, inspiring and easy — both to discover and to share.
about.community_text: Established artists, hobby creators and curious buyers gather here in a safe and warm environment. Our vision is to create a marketplace that feels personal, human and free from unnecessary obstacles. A place where you can find something unique, or let your own creations reach more people.

pillars.text: Make it easier to sell and buy art without hassle
Highlight both new and experienced creators
Create a community where inspiration and creativity can flow
Give artworks a longer life and new contexts

about.closing_1: Whether you paint, photograph, sculpt or simply love surrounding yourself with beautiful things — you are welcome here.
about.closing_2: Konstbyte is for those who want to discover, create, be inspired — and pass it on.

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.step_1: Create an account and upload your artwork.
how_it_works.step_2: Set a price or use AI valuation as a guide.
how_it_works.step_3: Sell securely with Stripe and follow the order in your profile.

fees.title: Fees & pricing
fees.stripe_note: Payments are handled securely via Stripe.

success.title: Payment successful!
success.description: Thank you for your purchase. Your payment has been processed.
success.next_step_1: The artist will pack and ship your artwork within 1–2 business days.
success.next_step_2: You will receive an email with tracking information when the work has been shipped.
success.legal: Your purchase is binding. The right of withdrawal does not apply to original artworks under the Distance Contracts Act.
success.generic_thanks: Thank you for your purchase. The artist will pack and ship your artwork within 1–2 business days.

cancel.title: Payment cancelled
cancel.description: Your payment was cancelled. No money has been charged.
cancel.no_charge: No payment has been made. You can go back and try again when you're ready.

hemsidor.hero_badge: Web developer in Gothenburg · Delivery in 3 days
hemsidor.hero_title: Your next customer finds you through your website — not your old one.
hemsidor.hero_description: I build modern, fast websites for small businesses in Gothenburg. You get a site that looks premium, loads instantly and actually helps you sell — ready in 3 days.
hemsidor.target_title: This is for you if you…
hemsidor.target1: Run a small business in Gothenburg, Hisingen or Västra Götaland
hemsidor.target2: Have an old or messy website that isn't bringing you customers
hemsidor.target3: Have no website at all and want something professional in place fast
hemsidor.target4: Are tired of expensive agencies that take months and deliver mediocre results
hemsidor.target5: Want someone who cares about your results — not just delivering code
hemsidor.problem_title: A bad website costs you customers every day.
hemsidor.problem1_desc: People form an opinion about your business in under 3 seconds. An outdated site sends the wrong signal — and the customer is gone.
hemsidor.problem2_desc: If people can't find what they need in 10 seconds, they leave. A cluttered structure means you lose customers you never even knew about.
hemsidor.problem3_desc: Design says more about you than you think. An outdated site makes potential customers choose your competitor instead.
hemsidor.problem4_desc: Every extra second of load time reduces conversions by up to 20%. And Google ranks you lower for it.
hemsidor.problem5_desc: Over 60% of your visitors are on their phone. A mobile site that doesn't work loses half your audience instantly.
hemsidor.problem6_desc: Without SEO, no one finds you organically. It's like having a shop with the sign facing the wall.
hemsidor.solution_title: A website built to win you customers — not just look good.
hemsidor.solution1_desc: Your site loads in under 1 second. Google loves it. So do your customers.
hemsidor.solution2_desc: Looks perfect on phone, tablet and desktop — always.
hemsidor.solution3_desc: Right structure, right words, right tech. You show up on Google from the moment the site goes live.
hemsidor.solution4_desc: Update text, images and prices yourself — without calling me.
hemsidor.solution5_desc: Modern, clean and professional. A design that makes you stand out.
hemsidor.solution6_desc: No months of waiting. I deliver fast without cutting corners.
hemsidor.solution7_desc: You know exactly what you're paying before we start. No hidden fees.
hemsidor.solution8_desc: I'm available for questions and adjustments. You're never left alone with your site.
hemsidor.process_title: From idea to live in 5 simple steps
hemsidor.process1_desc: We meet briefly — online or in Gothenburg — and go through what you need, what your customers are looking for, and how your site should look. Completely free, no obligation.
hemsidor.process2_desc: You get to see exactly how the site will look before I start building. Nothing gets built until you're happy with it.
hemsidor.process3_desc: I build your website with modern technology. You can give feedback along the way and I'll keep you updated.
hemsidor.process4_desc: Your site goes live — I handle domain, SSL and hosting. You don't have to lift a finger.
hemsidor.process5_desc: I'm here for questions, updates and adjustments. No one is left alone with a new website.
hemsidor.testimonial1_text: I had an old website nobody found. Now I get calls every week from new customers who found me on Google. Theo delivered in 3 days and was super easy to work with throughout.
hemsidor.testimonial1_author: Anna L., hair salon in Hisingen
hemsidor.testimonial2_text: Finally a web developer who doesn't speak in technical jargon. Theo explained everything clearly and the result exceeded my expectations. Highly recommended!
hemsidor.testimonial3_text: Fast, professional and a great eye for design. The price was fair and I got exactly what I wanted — with no hidden costs.
hemsidor.testimonial3_author: Sara J., nail technician in Västra Frölunda
hemsidor.portfolio_title: Websites I've built — see the results.
hemsidor.portfolio1_desc: Modern booking site for a spa and wellness clinic. Built-in payment, automated booking confirmations and an admin panel managed entirely without technical help.
hemsidor.portfolio2_desc: Full e-commerce platform with community features, AI integration and complete admin dashboard. Built to scale from day one.
hemsidor.portfolio3_desc: Professional website for a cleaning company in Gothenburg. Clear service presentation, quote form and mobile-friendly design that generates more enquiries.
hemsidor.pricing1_desc: For you who want a fast, professional online presence
hemsidor.pricing1_feature1: Responsive design — works on all devices
hemsidor.pricing2_desc: For you who want a website that works for you
hemsidor.pricing2_feature3: Admin panel: update content without help
hemsidor.pricing3_desc: Complete solution with everything you could need
hemsidor.pricing_note: All prices exclude VAT. Not sure which package fits? Book a free consultation and we'll figure it out.
hemsidor.faq_title: Everything you're wondering before reaching out.
hemsidor.faq1_q: How long does it take to build my website?
hemsidor.faq1_a: Most projects I deliver within 3 working days after we've agreed on design and content. More complex solutions may take up to a week.
hemsidor.faq2_q: Do I need an existing domain name?
hemsidor.faq2_a: No, I handle that. Help with choosing and registering a domain name is included in the process.
hemsidor.faq3_q: Can I update the website myself?
hemsidor.faq3_a: Yes — in the Premium and Full Service packages you get an admin panel where you can easily update text, images and prices without contacting me.
hemsidor.faq4_q: What if I'm not happy with the design?
hemsidor.faq4_a: Before I start building I present a design proposal. You approve it before we proceed — nothing gets built without your green light.
hemsidor.faq5_q: Will my website appear on Google straight away?
hemsidor.faq5_a: Google indexes all sites I build and I implement correct technical SEO from the start. Climbing the search results takes time, but the foundation is right from day one.
hemsidor.faq6_a: The Start package includes 2 weeks of email support. Premium includes 1 month and Full Service includes 3 months. I always respond quickly.
hemsidor.local_title: Web developer in Gothenburg — available when you need it.
hemsidor.local_desc1: I'm based in Gothenburg and primarily work with small businesses in Gothenburg, Hisingen, Mölndal, Kungsbacka and the rest of Västra Götaland. We can meet in person if you prefer — but most projects run smoothly via video calls.
hemsidor.local_desc2: Hiring a local web developer means you have a real contact person you can actually call — not an anonymous support form at a big agency.
hemsidor.local_cities: Gothenburg · Hisingen · Frölunda · Mölndal · Partille · Kungsbacka · Kungälv · Lerum
hemsidor.about_title: Hi — I'm Theo, your web developer in Gothenburg.
hemsidor.about_para1: I've been building digital products for over 5 years — from startup platforms to local small business sites. My degree in computer science gives me the technical foundation. My passion for design and conversion means every site actually performs.
hemsidor.about_para2: I know you don't want a website — you want more customers. That's why I build sites that don't just look good, but actually convert visitors into paying customers.
hemsidor.about_para3: I work on one project at a time and give every client my full attention. You talk directly with me — no project manager, no middleman.
hemsidor.cta_description: I'll look at your situation and tell you exactly what you need — no sales pitch, no obligation. Most people feel reassured after just 15 minutes.
hemsidor.form_url_label: Your current website (if you have one)
hemsidor.form_success: Thank you! I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
hemsidor.form_error: Something went wrong — please try again later.
hemsidor.form_note: I'll get back to you within 24 hours. No spam, no pushy sales calls.
